lines.speaker: Preswylwyr Dall
lines.text: Hello! What can I do for you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's nice to meet you Preswylwyr, I'm [player name].

lines.speaker: Preswylwyr Dall
lines.text: And it's great to meet you, [player name].

lines.speaker: Preswylwyr Dall
lines.text: I'm Gwerin's partner, he runs the mill while it's my job to use up all the flour he produces.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You bake? So that's what the wonderful smell is.

lines.speaker: Preswylwyr Dall
lines.text: Ha ha! Would you care for some bread? There should be some on the table.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really? That's very nice of you, thanks!

lines.speaker: Preswylwyr Dall
lines.text: No problem! Was there anything else you wanted?
